full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Set up evaluation metrics and confusion matrices for all three models
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Evaluate three models (rigid SVM, DPM, DPM+HNM) on the test set. Show accuracy, precision, recall, F1 for each. Generate confusion matrices side by side.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Added ROC-AUC computation and ROC curve plotting. Changed confusion matrix visualization to use seaborn heatmap with annotated counts.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Compare our results with paper claims
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Create a table comparing our toy-dataset results with the DPM paper's PASCAL VOC results. Include a discussion of expected differences due to dataset simplicity.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Added markdown discussion cells explaining why our results diverge from the paper (synthetic vs real data, simplified feature space). Added prediction visualization scatter plot.

top_5_prompts: How do I compute precision, recall, F1, and ROC-AUC for multi-model comparison?
Plot confusion matrices for three classifiers side by side using seaborn heatmap.
Generate ROC curves comparing rigid SVM, DPM, and DPM+HNM on test data.
How should our toy-dataset results compare to Table 1 in the DPM paper (PASCAL VOC 2007)?
Create a scatter plot of predictions colored by true vs predicted class for error analysis.

student_declaration.statement: I confirm this file accurately reports LLM usage for this task.
